html:
“Shoots freezing projectiles.”

-

The Ice Staff is a Magical Ranged Weapon. It requires 1 Spear and 1 Blue Gem to craft and a Prestihatitator to prototype. It may also be found in an Ornate Chest or dropped by an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when struck with a Hammer.


When used, the Ice Staff temporarily freezes a Mob usually within 1-4 blasts. Small creatures such as Birds and Rabbits take one blast to be frozen, while big ones such as Treeguards take four blasts before they are frozen. Each use costs 5% durability, equating to 20 uses.

Each time an Ice Staff is used, the character's Sanity is decreased by 1.

Creatures that periodically drop things (such as Beefalo producing Manure) will still leave them behind while frozen.

Occasionally, an Ice Staff can be found surrounded by sleeping Blue Hounds: this is a Set Piece trap. When the Staff is taken, the player will lose 33 Sanity, it will rain, and all the Hounds will wake up and attack - otherwise, the player can walk among them safely. The Blue Hounds can be killed one by one while asleep before picking up the staff, and the others will not wake up. The Ice Staff will have a random amount of durability.

The Ice Staff can be used to extinguish smoldering or burning objects.

Freezing Effect

Mobs have varying resistance to the Ice Staff's freezing effect and may require several charges in order to be frozen.

Mobs below that are bolded (mostly bosses) have the diminishing returns trait. A mob with this trait will gradually require more and more hits with the ice staff to freeze, up to a maximum of 2.5 * its natural resistance. This extra resistance rises at a rate of 25% of the natural resistance each time the mob is frozen. Additionally, the time it takes for the mob to thaw and unfreeze is also gradually reduced, down to a minimum of just 0.1 second. The extra resistance gained slowly decays.

1 Blast:

  • Bee
  • Birchnutter
  • Butterfly
  • Catcoon
  • Crow / Redbird / Snowbird / Canary
  • Frog
  • Grass Gekko
  • Moleworm
  • Mosquito
  • No-Eyed Deer / Red Gem Deer
  • Rabbit / Beardling
  • Smallbird
  • Wobster / Lunar Wobster

2 Blasts:

  • Ancient Guardian
  • Batilisk
  • Beefalo
  • Beehive
  • Bunnyman / Beardlord
  • Buzzard
  • Clockwork Bishop / Clockwork Rook / Clockwork Knight
  • Glommer
  • Gobbler
  • Grumble Bee
  • Hound
  • MacTusk / Mactusk N' Son
  • Merm
  • Splumonkey / Powder Monkey / Prime Ape
  • Pig / Guardian Pig / Werepig / Elite Pig
  • Slurper
  • Slurtle / Snurtle
  • Spider / Spider Warrior / Spitter / Cave Spider
  • Spider Den (Tier 1)
  • Smallish Tallbird
  • Volt Goat

3 Blasts:

  • Beefalo
  • Crab King (may be raised with , , )
  • Ewecus
  • Houndius Shootius
  • Koalefant / Winter Koalefant
  • Krampus
  • Lavae
  • Extra-Adorable Lavae
  • Spider Den (Tier 2)
  • Spider Queen
  • Tallbird
  • Tentacle / Baby Tentacle
  • Varg
  • Willow

4 Blasts:

  • Antlion
  • Bearger
  • Bee Queen
  • Characters
  • Deerclops
  • Klaus
  • Red Hound
  • Moose/Goose / Mossling
  • Spider Den (Tier 3)
  • Toadstool
  • Treeguard
  • Frostjaw

5 Blasts:

  • Pengull

8 Blasts:

  • Dragonfly

12 Blasts:

  • Enraged Dragonfly

Creatures that are immune to Ice Staff's freezing effect:

  • Lureplant / Eyeplant
  • Rock Lobster
  • Depths Worm
  • Chester
  • Blue Hound
  • Clay Varg / Clay Hound
  • Blue Gem Deer
  • Ghost
  • Shadow Creature / Shadow Pieces
  • King of the Merms
  • Ink Blight
  • Great Depths Worm
  • Crystal Deerclops
  • Celestial Champion
  • Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T.
  • Celestial Revenant

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Icerod skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Elegant initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
Woven - Elegant
An Eye for an Eye Collection
Icerod
Give your enemies much more than the cold shoulder.

Compatible skins from Spear:

Trivia

  • The Ice Staff was added in A Winter's Tale update.
  • This item used to be a part of the Gemology tab before it was removed.
  • Glommer in the Reign of Giants DLC is the only mob that is not encased in ice when frozen.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Gậy Băng là một vũ khí tầm xa có phép thuật. Nó cần 1 Giáo và 1 Ngọc Xanh để chế tạo và một Mũ Linh Vật để nguyên mẫu. Nó cũng có thể được tìm thấy trong Rương trang trí công phu hoặc rơi ra từ Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại khi bị đập bằng Búa.
